=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:36-5:53) TS377023: Global 'Error' loses type safety as untagged errors merge together in the Effect failure channel. Consider using a tagged error and optionally wrapping the original in a 'cause' property. effect(globalErrorInEffectFailure)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectFailure for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectFailure for entire file"
